heroTitle: KNX Smart Home Solutions for Luxury Villas
heroText: We design and integrate KNX smart home systems for luxury villas in Marbella, Sotogrande, and the Costa del Sol. Total control, comfort, and energy efficiency from a single app.
service1Text: Complete KNX systems integrating lighting, climate, blinds, and security into one seamless smart home experience.
service2Text: Diagnosis and repair of existing automation systems, restoring full functionality and control.
service3Text: Upgrade existing properties with smart home technology to improve comfort, efficiency, and property value.
service4Text: Ongoing maintenance and monitoring of KNX installations to ensure reliable performance at all times.
lightingText: Custom lighting scenes, dimming, and automation designed to enhance comfort and ambiance throughout your home.
climateText: Advanced climate management systems that maximize comfort while reducing energy consumption.
shuttersText: Automated shading systems integrated with lighting and climate to improve comfort and efficiency.
securityText: Smart security solutions with remote monitoring, alarms, and sensors for complete peace of mind.
automationText: Fully integrated KNX systems designed, installed, and programmed for high-end residential projects.
audioText: Multiroom audio and home cinema systems delivering high-quality sound across the entire property.
tvText: Professional TV installation with clean finishes, wall mounting, and concealed cable management.
intercomText: Modern video intercom systems with remote access and full integration into your smart home system.
project1Text: Full integration of lighting, climate, and blinds in a luxury villa in Marbella, providing total control and comfort.
project2Text: Custom lighting scenes tailored to the client’s lifestyle, enhancing both ambiance and usability.
project3Text: High-end audiovisual installation delivering a premium cinema experience at home.
project4Text: Professional rack setup and structured cabling ensuring reliable connectivity across the entire property.
project5Text: Electrical panel upgrades and KNX system maintenance to ensure long-term reliability and performance.
project6Text: Smart IP intercom system with remote access fully integrated into the home.
footerDescription: KNX smart home integration and automation systems for luxury villas in Marbella and the Costa del Sol
areasDescription: We provide KNX smart home integration services across Marbella, Estepona, Sotogrande, and the Costa del Sol.
contactDescription: Tell us about your project and we’ll help you create a smarter, more comfortable, and energy-efficient home.
